title: add podman container and image command

comments.body:
podman container attach == podman attach.  It is just a different interface into the same calls.  I want to add a podman container cleanup though which we could call from conmon when we want to cleanup containers running in daemon mode.

podman image COMMAND is also the same as podman COMMAND.
Should we add these commands to commands.md?

:pushpin: Commit bb81f8e has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat bb81f8e63a784b5f97c4386e4acba799ffb5c689 -->
